title: Bark and production waste, scrap, rejects and residues (Tariff notice 11)
body: "New explanatory notes  A new Combined Nomenclature Explanatory Note was published on 4 February 2025.  Explanatory Notes to the Combined Nomenclature of the European Union.  (C/2025/825)  This is not considered a change in Northern Ireland practice.  Classification (Combined Nomenclature (CN) code)  4401 49 10 and 4401 49 90  Reason  Pursuant to Article 9(1), point (a), of Council Regulation (EEC) No 2658/87, the Explanatory notes to the Combined Nomenclature of the European Union are amended as follows:  On page 215, the following explanatory note is inserted:  4401 49 10 — Bark and production waste, scrap, rejects and residues  This subheading includes byproducts, not useable as timber, of industrial roundwood processing and of wood products manufacturing.  For example, saw mill or planing mill rejects (slabs, edgings, trimmings, etc.); other manufacturing waste (veneer log cores, veneer rejects, etc.); broken planks; bark and shavings; other waste and scrap of joinery and carpentry free from contamination (for example, by screws, nails, paint).  Spent dyewood and tanning wood are also included in this subheading.  4401 49 90 — Other  This subheading includes post-consumer wood waste and scrap such as old crates and pallets not useable as such, wood waste and scrap segregated from construction and demolition waste (whether or not mechanically or chemically contaminated) and not useable as timber.  For reference: Product images are contained within the new CNEN.  Contact details   Tariff ClassificationCustoms Policy & Strategy3rd Floor14 Westfield AvenueStratfordLondonE20 1HZ   Email: tariff.classification@hmrc.gov.uk  This Tariff notice is published for information purposes only.  "

taxons.title: Customs declarations, duties and tariffs (import and export)
